Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol outranges and pushes better. Farm defensively.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W — stay out of range.
Aurelion Sol.mid_game: Use E to close distance when safe. Teamfight.
Aurelion Sol.win_condition: Win 1v1s on side lanes. Get picks.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Yasuo outscales — your 1v1 is stronger late
Aurelion Sol.positioning: Close distance with E. Avoid teamfights.

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has burst with Tibbers. Trade when stun down.
Annie.ability_to_dodge: Annie Q — dodge by moving away.
Annie.mid_game: Use E to close and all-in. Teamfight carefully.
Annie.scaling: Yasuo outscales — your 1v1 beats her burst late
Annie.positioning: Close with E when safe. Avoid teamfights.

Lissandra.positioning: Close with E when safe. Avoid teamfights.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion has tankiness. Trade when Q down.

Sion.mid_game: Use E to close and burst. Teamfight carefully.
Sion.scaling: Sion outscales — his tankiness dominates late
Sion.positioning: Close with E when safe. Target him in teamfights.
